source.description: NOAA National Geophysical Data Center (NGDC) Global Historical Tsunami Database. Contains tsunami source events and runup observations worldwide from ancient times to present.

datasets.events.parquet: Tsunami source events with cause, magnitude, and impact data
datasets.runups.parquet: Individual runup observations with wave heights and locations

metrics.cause: Cause of tsunami (earthquake, volcanic, landslide, etc.)
metrics.max_water_height_m: Maximum observed water height in meters
metrics.runup_count: Number of runup observations for this event
metrics.deaths: Number of deaths attributed to the tsunami
metrics.damage_millions: Estimated damage in millions of USD
metrics.water_height_m: Observed water height at runup location (meters)

geographic_context.focus: Historical tsunami events and runup observations

data_quality_notes: Ancient events (pre-1900) based on historical accounts and may have uncertain dates/locations
Runup heights from post-event surveys and tide gauges
eq_event_id links to triggering earthquake in earthquakes dataset
volcano_id links to triggering volcano in volcanoes dataset
